title: bidens gypsophila
intro: Bidens gypsophila, also known as Gypsy Cottontop or Bidens gypsophila, is a flowering plant species within the aster family. Traditionally, Bidens gypsophila has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever and pain, and it is also believed to have antiviral and antibacterial properties. Bidens gypsophila is typically prepared as a tea or infusion for medicinal purposes, and it can also be used in salves and creams to aid in wound healing.
